scenarios.title: Foreground watcher
scenarios.description: Scanning for a particular LE advertisement containing a matching manufacturer data section and above a certain RSSI threshold. This scenario requires Scenario 2 or 4 to run on another Windows platform in close proximity of this one.

controls.inner_text: Scan using both the 1M and Coded PHYs
Use coexistence optimized Bluetooth LE advertisement scan parameters and offloading the filter to hardware
Press the Run button to begin scanning. Received advertisements are shown below.

scenarios.title: Foreground publisher
scenarios.description: Publishing a LE advertisement. Press Run button to begin advertising. The advertisement generated by this scenario can be received by running Scenario 1 or 3 on another Windows platform in close proximity with this one.

controls.inner_text: Advertise using the Coded primary PHY and 2M secondary PHY

scenarios.title: Background watcher
scenarios.description: Scanning for a particular LE advertisement containing a matching manufacturer data section and above a certain RSSI threshold using a background trigger and task. This scenario requires Scenario 2 or 4 to run on another Windows platform in close proximity of this one.

controls.inner_text: Scan using both the 1M and Coded PHYs
Press the Run button to begin scanning. Received advertisements are parsed in the background task and shown below.

scenarios.title: Background publisher
scenarios.description: Publishing a LE advertisement in the background. Press Run button to register. The advertisement generated by this scenario can be received by running Scenario 1 or 3 on another Windows platform in close proximity with this one.

controls.inner_text: Advertising in the background only using the 2M and Coded PHYs
